meaning: n.木刻,[印]木刻印版,木版画
examples: The woodcut Autumn was conceived as a harvest scene.
Hakka people once played a positive role in the woodcut movement.
Luxun had deep love for artistic works all his life, especially in woodcut of block print.
Interleaved with over 150 woodcut illustrations, the volume is one of the first of its kind to have been done from observation.
